title: GROUP BY: number of seats per showtime
prompt_md: How many seats does each showtime have? Group the `seats` table by `showtime_id` and count the rows in each group. Return `showtime_id` and the count aliased as `seat_count`. Cast the count to a plain integer with `COUNT(*)::int`.
hints: `GROUP BY showtime_id` collapses all seats of one showtime into a single group.
`COUNT(*)` counts the rows in each group; cast it with `::int` so it's a plain integer.
reference_solution: SELECT showtime_id, COUNT(*)::int AS seat_count FROM seats GROUP BY showtime_id;
